# Source Index Autonomy Phase

Converted from `118_source_index_autonomy_phase.csv` so the pack remains Markdown-only.

| id | name | url | type | use | bias |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| GOOGLE_AI_MAX_SEARCH_API_2026 | Google Ads API: AI Max for Search campaigns | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/campaigns/ai-max-for-search-campaigns/getting-started | Official platform documentation | Search automation, query expansion, text customisation, URL expansion, brand/message controls, reporting views. | Platform documentation; accurate for capabilities but naturally pro-platform. |
| GOOGLE_RSA_API | Google Ads API: Creating Responsive Search Ads | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/responsive-search-ads/create-responsive-search-ads | Official platform documentation | API payload requirements for responsive search ads: headlines, descriptions, final URLs. | Platform documentation. |
| GOOGLE_PMAX_API | Google Ads API: Create Performance Max Campaign | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/performance-max/create-campaign | Official platform documentation | Performance Max campaign setup, campaign-level brand assets and brand-guideline migration context. | Platform documentation. |
| GOOGLE_DEMAND_GEN_API | Google Ads API: Demand Gen | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/demand-gen/overview | Official platform documentation | Visual surfaces across YouTube, Discover, Gmail; AI-optimised creatives with advertiser-controlled assets. | Platform documentation. |
| GOOGLE_EXPERIMENTS_API | Google Ads API: Experiments overview | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/experiments/overview | Official platform documentation | Campaign experiments, arms, scheduling, promote/graduate/end workflow. | Platform documentation. |
| GOOGLE_CONVERSION_LIFT | Google Ads Help: About conversion lift | https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/12003020?hl=en-AU | Official platform documentation | Incrementality and causal measurement; treatment/control lift logic. | Platform documentation; not a substitute for independent experimental design. |
| META_MARKETING_API | Meta Marketing API | https://developers.facebook.com/docs/marketing-api/ | Official platform documentation | Campaign, ad set, ad creative management through API. | Platform documentation. |
| META_LIFT_STUDIES | Meta Marketing API: Conversion Lift Measurement | https://developers.facebook.com/docs/marketing-api/guides/lift-studies/ | Official platform documentation | Campaign efficiency and business-impact experiments. | Platform documentation. |
| META_AD_STANDARDS | Meta Advertising Standards | https://transparency.meta.com/policies/ad-standards/ | Official platform policy | Compliance constraints for deceptive or misleading advertising. | Platform policy; enforcement details can be opaque. |
| TIKTOK_API_BUSINESS | TikTok API for Business: Marketing API | https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/marketing-api?lang=en | Official platform documentation | Batch delivery, creative-material management, intelligent bidding, automated optimisations, audience uploads. | Platform documentation. |
| LINKEDIN_CAMPAIGN_API | LinkedIn Marketing API: Create and Manage Campaigns | https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads/account-structure/create-and-manage-campaigns?view=li-lms-2026-04 | Official platform documentation | B2B campaign creation, objective types, campaign structure, budgets. | Platform documentation. |
| LINKEDIN_CREATIVES_API | LinkedIn Marketing API: Create and Manage Creatives | https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads/account-structure/create-and-manage-creatives?view=li-lms-2026-03 | Official platform documentation | Creative limits and format constraints. | Platform documentation. |
| OPENAI_AGENTS_SDK | OpenAI API: Agents SDK | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/agents | Official AI developer documentation | Agents that plan, call tools, coordinate specialist workflows, and keep state across multi-step tasks. | Vendor documentation; useful for implementation primitives. |
| OPENAI_STRUCTURED_OUTPUTS | OpenAI API: Structured Outputs | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/structured-outputs | Official AI developer documentation | Schema-adherent JSON outputs for campaign plans, claims, tests, compliance reports, payload drafts. | Vendor documentation. |
| OPENAI_FUNCTION_CALLING | OpenAI API: Function calling | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/function-calling | Official AI developer documentation | Tool calls to databases, ad APIs, approval queues, analytics warehouses, and validators. | Vendor documentation. |
| OPENAI_IMAGE_API | OpenAI API: Image generation | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/image-generation | Official AI developer documentation | Image generation/editing for static creative concepts and variations. | Vendor documentation; outputs still require rights, brand, and policy review. |
| OPENAI_AGENT_GUIDE | OpenAI: Practical guide to building AI agents | https://openai.com/business/guides-and-resources/a-practical-guide-to-building-ai-agents/ | Vendor implementation guide | Single-agent vs multi-agent patterns, tools, guardrails, evals, model/cost optimisation. | Vendor guide; useful implementation framework. |
| GOOGLE_MISREPRESENTATION_POLICY | Google Ads Policy: Misrepresentation | https://support.google.com/adspolicy/answer/6020955?hl=en | Official platform policy | Clear/honest ads, avoiding misleading product/service/business information, unreliable claims, clickbait, unclear relevance. | Platform policy; enforcement can be conservative. |
| ACCC_FALSE_MISLEADING | ACCC: False or misleading claims | https://www.accc.gov.au/consumers/advertising-and-promotions/false-or-misleading-claims | Australian regulator guidance | Claims must be true, accurate, based on reasonable grounds, and provable. | Regulator guidance; jurisdiction is Australia. |
| FTC_AI_ADS | FTC: Artificial Intelligence | https://www.ftc.gov/industry/technology/artificial-intelligence | US regulator hub | AI advertising claims, deceptive AI practices, substantiation expectations. | Regulator guidance; jurisdiction is US. |
| BANDIT_ADS_JD | Comparison Lift: Bandit-based Experimentation System for Online Advertising | https://cdn.aaai.org/ojs/17775/17775-13-21269-1-2-20210518.pdf | Academic/industry research paper | Bandit-based online ad experimentation architecture and exploration/exploitation tradeoffs. | Single platform/case; useful for architecture, not universal proof. |
| FACEBOOK_INCREMENTALITY_DESIGN | Designing Experiments to Measure Incrementality on Facebook | https://arxiv.org/abs/1806.02588 | Academic paper | Power and sample-size issues in lift-style ad incrementality experiments. | Methodological; not a modern platform manual. |
| GOOGLE_DEMAND_GEN_DROP_2026 | Google Ads & Commerce Blog: Demand Gen Drop March 2026 | https://blog.google/products/ads-commerce/demand-gen-drop-march-2026/ | Official platform blog | Veo in Google Ads, creative asset variation, creator partnerships. | Marketing blog; useful for direction of platform automation. |
